case_title: DERESH, DANIEL VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNI CLAIMS DIV.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNI CLAIMS DIV.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $800.00 FILED BY DERESH, DANIEL AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNI CLAIMS DIV. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-17-1997 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
